data.title: Loosely Coupled Architecture as an enforced architectural principle
data.description:
Integrate into dev-onboarding, preplanning, and implementation plan.

## Loosely Coupled Architecture

System architecture directly impacts team velocity. Transitioning from monolithic architectures to loosely coupled designs (like microservices) allows different parts of an application to operate independently.

**The Impact:** Teams can develop, test, and deploy their specific services without waiting on or breaking other teams' work, massively scaling productivity.

Loosely coupled architecture should be treated as a first-class architectural principle enforced through the planning and onboarding workflows — not merely suggested as a best practice.
